ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block containing the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block containing the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "confirmations" INTEGER /* Number of confirmations the transaction has received */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee */,
  "tx_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., send, receive) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, confirmed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_block_hash FOREIGN KEY ("block_hash") REFERENCES blocks ("block_hash")
)

CREATE TABLE "inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "input_index" INTEGER /* Index of the input in the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of cryptocurrency input */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address associated with the input */,
  "script_type" TEXT /* Type of script used for the input (e.g., P2PKH, P2SH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "output_index" INTEGER /* Index of the output in the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of cryptocurrency output */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address associated with the output */,
  "script_type" TEXT /* Type of script used for the output (e.g., P2PKH, P2SH) */,
  "spent" INTEGER /* Whether the output has been spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "analyzed_field" TEXT /* Field being analyzed (e.g., total_input, total_output) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the analyzed field */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was computed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., viewed, approved, rejected) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was mined */,
  "miner" TEXT /* Miner who mined the block */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for mining the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_balances" (
  "address_balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address balance */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address for which the balance is stored */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Balance of the address */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp when the balance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_balances_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES inputs ("address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_balances_address FOREIGN KEY ("address") REFERENCES outputs ("address")
)
